rogue_quick_strike.name: Quick Strike
rogue_quick_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A fast, simple dagger strike. Generates 15 Stamina and sets a 4-tick bleed.

mark_target.name: Mark Target
mark_target.description: Setup: Mark a foe's weak point. Applies [Marked] for 10 ticks.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: Payoff: A lethal puncture from behind. Deals massive Physical damage. Deals x4 damage if you are [Concealed].

visceral_strike.name: Visceral Strike
visceral_strike.description: Payoff: Strike a vital organ. Dealing moderate damage and applying [Maimed] (Reduced Damage) for 6 ticks.

vanish.name: Vanish
vanish.description: Defense/Stealth: Instantly enter stealth. Grants [Concealed] for 3 ticks and breaks target locks.

evasion.name: Evasion
evasion.description: Defense: Focus on dodging incoming attacks. Increases Evasion chance by 40% for 6 ticks.

shadowstep.name: Shadowstep
shadowstep.description: Mobility: Instantly move behind a target or into an adjacent room.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.description: Utility/Disruption: Blind all enemies in the room for 2 ticks and grants self [Concealed].

rogue_physiology.name: Rogue Physiology
rogue_physiology.description: Passive: Shadow Walker. You gain 10% movement speed and 15% increased Critical strike damage.
